title: HURRICANE 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips, Heavy Duty Metal Cutter Shears for Cutting Sheet Metal, Straight Cut, Chrome Vanadium Steel
features: 【Straight Regular Cut】HURRICANE 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips, Cuts straight and wide curves to the left and right, ensuring a secure hold and precise cuts. Ideal for Cutting Sheet Metal, copper, aluminum, plastic, thick cardboard, chicken wire, and hardware cloth.
【Longest Lasting Edge】Chrome Vanadium Steel, Serrated edge blades with sanding finish for maximum strength, durability, and long lifetime.
【Cut Capacity of Tin Snip】 With a cutting thickness range up to 18 gauge (1.2mm) cold-rolled steel sheet, 18 gauge (1.2mm) Galvanized sheet, and 22 gauge (0.7mm) stainless steel.
【Comfortable Grips】Ergonomical Tyregrip Handle with rubberized grip for comfort and control.

【Safety and High Efficiency】Locking latch prevents damage to cutting edge when stored. Spring-assisted latch on metal snips for fast one-handed operation. Tips- Please always wear gloves when you’re working!
description: Product Description HIGH QUALITY HVAC TOOLS Hurricane 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips, Straight 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips Set Straight, Ergonomical TyreGrip Handle Hurricane 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips. Yellow Straight Cut, Chrome Vanadium Steel, Serrated edge blades with sanding finish for maximum strength, durability, and long lifetime. Durable Cutting Edge Cut Capacity of Tin Snip With a cutting thickness range up to 18 gauge (1.2mm) cold-rolled steel sheet, 18 gauge (1.2mm) Galvanized sheet, and 22 gauge (0.7mm) stainless steel. Ergonomical Handle with Hang Hole TyreGrip Handle Ergonomical Tyregrip Handle with rubberized grip for comfort and control. HIGH QUALITY Durable Cutting Edge Chrome Vanadium Steel Cutting: Cuts up to 1/16"(1.7mm) cold-rolled steel sheet; straight cut, left cut, right cut. Safty Lock Locking latch prevents damage to cutting edge when stored. TyreGrip Series Handle Ergonomic Non-Slip Soft Grip Handle provide excellent control and easy cleaning with built-in hang hole for convenient storage Safety Locking Latch Easy latch and lock function keep your hands safe and sound This helps protect the blade’s sharp cutting edge when in storage Hurricane 10 Inch Aviation Tin Snips, Straight Cut Heavy Duty Metal Cutter for Cutting Sheet Metal, Chrome Vanadium Steel
